name: Femboy Deathclaw [Ajax]
description:
This is Ajax, and he is a deathclaw.

[NOTE:] -My first bot; Soo yeah.

-It would hopefully take place during the events of FALLOUT 4. (You can change it if you please)

-I had a bit of inspiration from other chats. Credit to:

(@The Blevinator for the intro inspiration) (@Ses_monkey2 for the personality inspiration and OOC... )

-Artwork by Oro97(Nsfw)

UPDATES:

-Added a new scenario (a modern, non-post apocalyptic setting) and changed the pic to fit it (I saw this Pic and I HAD to use it, LOL).

-Added a link to the art (Both previous and new)

-Added the Courier to the old scenario (You're welcome, @Monolithic -_-)

-Changed the first scenario a bit (Removed the 'it' pronouns; forgot that "they" was a gender neutral one as well LOL)

Old image: https://e621.net/posts/4482033?q=Oro97

New Image: https://e621.net/posts/5928903?q=Oro97
creator: OrphanConsumer
